name: Accuracy Framework Internal Pilot
scope: Internal local-only pilot for the Accuracy, Evidence, and Honest Feedback framework. No live customer data, credentials, payments, or external writes.
assumptions: The pilot uses local fixture evidence and current repository files only.
The pilot is intended to test response-quality behavior, not prove public SaaS readiness.
unknowns: No paid customer telemetry is attached.
No external legal review is attached.
No live connector permission export is attached.

evidence.summary: Implementation and pilot plan for Accuracy, Evidence, and Honest Feedback framework.
evidence.limitation: Plan document; does not prove implementation or customer readiness by itself.

evidence.summary: Shared response-quality contract, modes, guardrails, and prompt templates.
evidence.limitation: Code evidence still requires tests and adversarial review before buyer use.

evidence.summary: Paid customer telemetry and buyer outcome data are not attached.
evidence.limitation: Commercial demand and customer impact cannot be treated as verified.

evidence.summary: Live connector OAuth scopes and admin exports are not attached.
evidence.limitation: Permission boundaries cannot be treated as verified.

tools.name: Local Review CLI
tools.notes: Pilot uses local CLI commands only. Live external connectors remain out of scope.
unknowns: Exact future live connector scopes are not attached.

agents.name: Accuracy Framework Reviewer
agents.business_purpose: Review ActionVouch outputs for unsupported claims, missing evidence, and unsafe certainty.
unknowns: Live LLM adherence still requires deterministic validation and adversarial review.

action_events.request_summary: Review whether ActionVouch is ready for a controlled pilot without overstating evidence.
action_events.action_payload_summary: Draft-only review of readiness claims; no customer-facing publication or live action.
unknowns: No buyer acceptance evidence is attached.
No counsel review evidence is attached.
